title: FMD - Both earbuds connected - Play button
scenario: Find My Device tone plays on both earbuds with flashing lights and animated UI when triggered via Lens app, and tapping Stop returns to pre-play state
steps: 1. Ensure both earbuds are connected to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
5. Tap the headset card for the connected device.
7. Observe the behavior on the earbuds and the app screen.
expected: Tapping Play causes a tone to play on both earbuds with flashing lights, a "Sending tone..." message with an animated stop button, and an animated illustration. Tapping Stop returns the state to the same as before playing the tone.
